title: Automated Dashboard Report Delivery via Email in Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there an option to send a dashboard to individuals via email, instead of subscribing them to the dashboard? For example, is there an app with an automation that can automatically send a bi-weekly report from a pr…

posts.author: mchris (Marianna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there an option to send a dashboard to individuals via email, instead of subscribing them to the dashboard? For example, is there an app with an automation that can automatically send a bi-weekly report from a project overview in the dashboard to a person?

Thank you.

posts.author: HPETRIE (Hannah Petrie)
posts.cookedHtml: Following this thread. I don’t believe this exists yet, @mchris. I’ve been following along on another thread and don’t see a solution yet: Creating automatic email reports with board view

posts.author: DascroTech (Dascro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Marianna,

There is a app - “Board Automation Reports” which can be used to create two automations for bi-weekly scenario.

You can set one for every first of the month and other for every 15th of the month.

Hope that helps!

  • Dascro

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mchris

By using Automatic Board Reporting (ABR) functionality, reports and information in dashboards can be shared to user emails via PDF files easily. This report sharing approach enables your clients or customers to get insights into deal progress, project flow/performance, and others. Being a reputable monday.com consulting services provider, our dedicated consultants can help you with the dashboard creation and configuration of Automatic Board Reporting functionality in your monday.com account.

Please reach out to us and start sharing dashboard data easily!
